---
applyTo: "app/**/*.php,routes/**/*.php,resources/views/**/*.blade.php,database/migrations/**/*.php"
description: "Use when editing Laravel e-commerce flow: products, cart, dashboard, admin CRUD, Blade and routes."
---
- Keep controllers thin and use named routes.
- Keep Blade templates readable and split reusable sections into partials.
- For admin pages, prefer resourceful route and controller style.
- For listing pages, use pagination where data can grow.
- Use consistent product fields: name, slug, description, image_url, price, stock, is_active.
- Keep UI copy concise and realistic for e-commerce context.
